_comment: Sibling MCP directory advertised by the Solstice discovery hub. The hub holds no sibling credentials and relays no calls; the IDE connects to each sibling MCP directly using the auth_type and setup_instructions shown here.

linear.setup_instructions: OAuth via Linear in Cursor MCP settings.

jam.setup_instructions: OAuth via Jam in Cursor MCP settings.

slack.setup_instructions: Requires a Slack bot token configured in Cursor MCP settings; no public MCP endpoint.
